relationships.context: OET BV was incorporated as a private limited liability company under the Netherlands Chamber of Commerce.
OEM BV holds 100% of the total shareholding of Etergo with 89,976,774,813 shares.
Etergo's shareholding pattern is disclosed within the Draft Red Herring Prospectus of Ola Electric.

entities.name: Issued, subscribed and paid-up share capital

relationships.context: EOB BV was incorporated as a private limited liability company under the Netherlands Chamber of Commerce.

entities.name: qualifying shareholding
entities.value: 12.5% of the economic interest in the fully diluted share capital

relationships.context: SB holds a qualifying shareholding of 12.5% of the economic interest in Ola Electric.
SB is entitled to nominate one director on the Board of Ola Electric provided they maintain qualifying shareholding.
The Promoter is participating in the Offer for Sale of Ola Electric.
Bhavish Aggarwal serves as the Chairman and Managing Director of Ola Electric.
The Board of Ola Electric comprises six Directors as of the date of the DRHP.
